name: ai-quartermaster
description: AI 병참부 - GitHub Issue to Draft PR automation pipeline

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = 'dist/cli.js'; const content = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); if (!content.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node')) { fs.writeFileSync(path, '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' + content); console.log('Shebang added to dist/cli.js'); } else { console.log('Shebang already present in dist/cli.js'); }"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
